about.description: TrainUp Online Academy is a next-generation learning platform aimed at developing professional skills through accessible, flexible, and practical courses.We bring together the best Armenian-speaking and internationally experienced professionals to provide you with learning that delivers real results.
about.vision_text: At TrainUp Online Academy, our vision is simple:To create an educational platform where everyone can develop their skills, discover new opportunities, and build a successful future—regardless of age, location, or prior knowledge.
about.mission_text: The mission of TrainUp Online Academy is to provide accessible, practical, and modern education for everyone. We believe that everyone can develop skills, enter new fields, increase their salary, or start their own business if they have the right knowledge and guidance.
about.why_choose_us_text: TrainUp Online Academy is an online platform where you can develop your skills at any level, from beginner to advanced. We offer modern courses, practical assignments, and support from experienced professionals.
about.our_team_text: Our team consists of experienced professionals with years of real project experience. They not only teach theory but also guide students throughout the process of acquiring practical skills.
about.goal_1: Provide students with in-demand practical skills,
about.goal_2: Ensure high-quality instructors with real-world experience,
about.goal_3: Create a supportive community where everyone can grow and develop,
about.goal_4: Offer a learning environment that motivates to learn, try, and move forward.

contact.description: Contact us for any questions, support, or guidance. Our team is always ready to assist you quickly and efficiently at every step.

blok_1.title: Modern and In-Demand Professions
blok_1.text: We offer courses that match the latest global market demands. Our programs are constantly updated so you can learn real, practical skills—UI/UX, web development, AI tools, social media, and many other directions. This is the kind of knowledge that helps you progress quickly and become a competitive professional, whether you’re a beginner or already experienced.

blok_2.title: Experienced Instructors with Real Industry Practice
blok_2.text: The instructors at TrainUp Academy are professionals with years of experience working on real projects, businesses, and international clients. They teach not only theory but real working approaches—sharing practical techniques, methods, and insights to avoid common mistakes. You learn what is actually used in the market and what brings real results.

blok_3.title: Learn Anytime and Anywhere
blok_3.text: All our training is fully online and available 24/7. This means you can study at your own pace—after work, on weekends, or even while traveling. No strict schedules, no limitations—you organize your learning process in the way that works best for you. This flexibility makes education more effective for everyone.

blok_4.title: Practice with Real Examples
blok_4.text: Our courses are built on hands-on learning. You’ll get not only theoretical material but also real assignments, mini-projects, and case studies that help strengthen your skills through practice. Every student builds a personal portfolio that can be presented to employers and used when entering a new profession.

blok_5.title: Continuous Support and Mentorship
blok_5.text: At TrainUp Academy, you never study alone. Throughout the entire learning process, we provide support—from mentors, instructors, and the community. You can write anytime to get answers, help, corrections, or advice. We believe that proper guidance is essential for success, and we support you until the final result.

blok_6.title: Affordable Prices and Free Enrollment
blok_6.text: Our mission is to make quality education accessible, so we offer affordable prices, a flexible payment system, and free enrollment. This allows you to start learning easily without a heavy financial burden. We want everyone to have the opportunity to study, grow, and build a stable career.

teach_whit_us.title: Teach with us
teach_whit_us.text: Share your professional expertise with thousands of learners. Become an instructor on our platform, gain recognition, share your knowledge and experience, and help develop the next generation of professionals.
teach_whit_us.why_text: Share your expertise, provide learners with new knowledge and skills, and grow as a professional instructor.
teach_whit_us.feature1_text: Your courses help learners acquire modern, practical skills that are highly sought after in the real world.
teach_whit_us.feature2_text: Gain recognition on our platform, collaborate with experienced instructors, and expand your professional network.
teach_whit_us.feature3_text: Receive full support, access new teaching methods, and develop your instructional skills.

begin.title: Become an Instructor: Step by Step

step1.title: Plan Your Curriculum
step1.text1: Start by carefully planning your course topics and structure. Determine what your students need to learn and how to present it to provide maximum value. Creating a smart and logical course plan not only helps students but also strengthens your expertise and teaching confidence.
step1.text2: Register on our platform to access all the tools for structuring lessons, adding materials, and tracking student progress. By dedicating time to planning your course, you ensure a professional and engaging learning experience for every student.

step2.title: Record Your Video
step2.text1: Next, create high-quality, engaging videos that showcase your knowledge and teaching style. Be ready to guide, mentor, and support your students throughout the course.
step2.text2: Include practical examples, real-world projects, and actionable exercises that allow students to immediately apply their skills. Videos are the core of your course — clear, interesting, and dynamic content keeps students’ attention and boosts motivation. The more effort you put into creating professional videos, the more your students will benefit from your expertise and the more visibility your course will gain.

step3.title: Publish Your Course
step3.text1: Finally, publish your course by adding it to your profile. Fill in all required fields, upload your prepared videos, course materials, and description.
step3.text2: Submit it for approval by our team. Once approved, your course becomes available to thousands of learners. By publishing your course, you join a community of experienced instructors who are shaping the next generation of professionals.

courses_page.header_description: Explore a wide range of professional courses designed to help you develop new skills and advance your career. Each program is created by industry experts and includes practical lessons, real-world examples, and hands-on exercises. Start learning today and unlock opportunities for your personal and professional growth.

terms_conditions.title: TERMS AND CONDITIONS
terms_conditions.welcome: Welcome to TrainUp Online Academy ("TrainUp", "we", "our", or "us"). By accessing or using our website www.trainup.academy (the "Website"), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms and Conditions ("Terms"). If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By registering or using TrainUp Online Academy, you confirm that you have read, understood, and accepted these Terms and our Privacy Policy.These Terms form a legally binding agreement under the laws of the Republic of Armenia.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility
sections.body: You must be at least 16 years old to use the platform. If you are under 18, you may only use it with parental or guardian consent.

sections.heading: 3. Account Registration
sections.body:
You agree to:
• Provide accurate and complete information.
• Keep your login credentials secure.
• Not share your account with others.

TrainUp reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts violating these Terms.

sections.heading: 4. Courses and Content
sections.body: All courses, materials, and videos are owned by TrainUp Online Academy or independent instructors. All intellectual property rights belong to TrainUp or content authors. You may use the materials only for personal learning purposes.

sections.heading: 5. Payments and Refunds
sections.body: • All prices are shown in Armenian Drams (AMD). • Access is granted only after full payment. • All sales are final and non-refundable, except for technical errors (e.g., duplicate payments or course access failures). Refund requests must be sent within 7 business days to support@trainup.academy.

sections.heading: 6. Certificates
sections.body: Some courses may provide digital certificates. TrainUp defines completion and certificate rules. Certificates are personal and cannot be resold or altered.

sections.heading: 7. User Conduct
8. Intellectual Property
sections.body: All site design, visuals, and course materials belong to TrainUp Online Academy. Unauthorized use, copying, or distribution is prohibited and may result in legal action.

sections.heading: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.body:
TrainUp is not liable for any indirect or consequential damages due to: 
• Technical issues or data loss, 
• Course content errors,
• Misuse by the user. 

All services are provided “as is”.

sections.heading: 10. Modifications
sections.body: TrainUp may update these Terms at any time. Changes become effective once posted on the website.

sections.heading: 11. Governing Law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Armenia. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of Yerevan, Armenia.

sections.heading: 12. Contact Us
sections.body: Yerevan, Republic of Armenia

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.body: TrainUp Online Academy (“TrainUp”, “we”, “our”, “us”) respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect data when you use our website, services, or enroll in our online courses. By using www.trainup.academy, you agree to this Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
sections.body:
• Name and surname
• Email address
• Phone number
• Payment details (processed securely via gateways)
• Technical data (IP, device, cookies)

sections.heading: 3. Purpose of Data Collection
sections.body:
We use your data to:
• Manage accounts and enrollments
• Process payments
• Communicate with you
• Improve our services
• Comply with Armenian law

sections.heading: 4. Cookies
sections.body: Cookies help us improve functionality, store preferences, and analyze site performance. You can disable cookies in your browser, but some features may not function properly.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your data only as long as necessary or as required by law.

sections.heading: 6. Data Protection
sections.body: We use SSL encryption, limited access, and secure third-party services to protect your data. Payment data is not stored on our servers.

sections.heading: 7. Sharing Information
sections.body:
We do not sell or rent data. We may share information only with:
• Trusted service providers
• Legal authorities if required by law

sections.heading: 8. Your Rights
sections.body: You may: • Access your data • Request correction or deletion • Withdraw consent • Request data copy Contact: support@trainup.academy.

sections.heading: 9. Third-Party Links
sections.body: We are not responsible for the privacy practices of external websites linked from our platform.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy. Updates take effect once published on our website.

sections.heading: 11. Contact
sections.body: Yerevan, Republic of Armenia
